allow: PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'ls /var/lib/postgresql/data | head -20' 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'ls /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf && head -50 /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf' 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'cat /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf | tail -10; echo "---"; ls /var/lib/postgresql/data/base/' 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'grep -v "^#" /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf | grep -v "^$" | head -10' 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'cat /etc/passwd | grep -i postgres; whoami; psql -U $\(whoami\) postgres -c "\\du" 2>&1 | head -20' 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i bin; which strings; ls /var/lib/postgresql/data/global/' 2>&1)

PowerShell(@\('postgres','splitdb','admin','user','splitter','bunq','dev','dhafin','dhafinrizaldi'\) | ForEach-Object { $u = $_; docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 psql -U $u -d postgres -c "SELECT current_user;" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { "[$u] $_" } })
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'grep -E "^port" /var/lib/postgresql/data/postgresql.conf 2>&1; echo "---"; netstat -tnlp 2>/dev/null | head -10' 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c 'grep -E "port|listen" /var/lib/postgresql/data/postgresql.conf | grep -v "^#"' 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 sh -c "pg_ctl status -D /var/lib/postgresql/data 2>&1; echo '---SINGLE---'; postgres --single -D /var/lib/postgresql/data postgres <<< 'SELECT rolname FROM pg_authid;' 2>&1 | head -30")
PowerShell(docker exec --user postgres bunq-hackathon-backend-db-1 bash -c "echo 'SELECT rolname FROM pg_authid LIMIT 20;' | postgres --single -D /var/lib/postgresql/data postgres 2>&1 | tail -30")
